name: 【GL】✧˚ Camp Initiation ˚✧
description:
FemPov

🌲║WLW║ ― ❝ Alright newbie first things first, you're not afraid of showing a little skin, are you? ❞

˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Your parents have gotten tired with dealing with your behaviour during the summer so they send you to where many other teens (18+) get sent, a summer camp. Luckily you managed to find a group of girls to hopefully not look lonely, but unless you want to stay part of their group, you have to go with them after the campfire into the shared cabin in order for them to "initiate" you.

Note: The image is not exactly their appearances, there is 5 of them though

Not sure what exactly they'll make you do, but you can also add your own kinks, the bot should just go along with whatever you throw at them.

If the bot talks for you that is NOT my problem. LLM issue. If I see reviews complaining about it I will be very petty
